name: @workbooks/site
description: Marketing + install landing page for workbooks.sh

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R src/. dist/
scripts.dev: bun run build && python3 -m http.server --directory dist 5175
scripts.deploy: bun run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name workbooks-shell --branch main --commit-dirty=true
